title: Opening for Category Manager at Hopscotch International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Hopscotch International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Hopscotch International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Hopscotch International Enterprises:
Hopscotch International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hopscotch International Enterprises!
